{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Ynthra system
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Ynthra system]] contains five [[Hives]] gathered by the [[Legion]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21">''The Captain'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The Ynthra system,” Sola said. “The Legion has gathered five Hives here, and no one knows why.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c21" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
